_rules.truth_source: This file is the project progress source of truth. AGENTS.md, progress.md, docs/handoff.md, contracts, QA reports, tests, and code must stay consistent with it.
_rules.pass_policy: Coding agents may change passes from false to true only after real verification evidence exists. Do not delete, weaken, rewrite, or rename feature items to make verification easier.
_rules.scope_policy: Each coding round should target one small feature item and leave the repo in a clean, verified state.

features.description: MockProvider returns hardcoded legal screenplay YAML and the web app displays it through the backend API.
steps: Start pnpm dev.
Click the mock/sample generate button.
Verify the page displays YAML containing schema_version, project, source, characters, locations, and scenes.
Run pnpm verify and pnpm test:ui.

features.description: Repository scripts, TypeScript, ESLint, Vitest, Playwright, and structured logs provide a repeatable development harness.
steps: Run pnpm install.
Run pnpm verify.
Run pnpm test:ui.
Run node scripts/read-dev-logs.js after a dev request.
Confirm failures include actionable messages instead of silent exits.

features.description: AJV structural validation enforces yaml-schema.md v1.0 required fields, enums, arrays, and minimum chapter count.
steps: Submit valid examples/screenplay-sample.yaml to /api/yaml/validate.
Delete schema_version and verify a precise path error.
Delete project.title and verify a precise path error.
Set beats[0].type to an invalid enum and verify a precise path error.
Run pnpm verify.

features.description: Application-layer validation checks references, conditional speaker requirements, ID uniqueness, and chapter coverage.
steps: Break a dialogue speaker reference and verify scenes[x].beats[y].speaker error.
Remove speaker from dialogue and inner_voice beats and verify conditional required errors.
Duplicate character/location/scene ids and verify duplicate id errors.
Leave a source chapter unused and verify a chapter coverage warning.
Run pnpm verify.

features.description: OpenAI-compatible provider runs single-stage novel-to-YAML generation and immediately returns validation results.
steps: Set LLM_PROVIDER=openai with local .env only.
Use examples/novel-sample.md as input.
Generate YAML through /api/screenplay/generate.
Verify the response includes yaml and validation with either valid:true or precise errors.
Switch back to LLM_PROVIDER=mock and verify mock flow still works.

features.description: Chapter splitting supports Chinese chapter titles, English Chapter headings, Markdown headings, and ---chapter--- separators.
steps: Submit at least four fixture texts to /api/chapters/split.
Verify each returns ordered chapter ids, titles, content, and word_count.
Submit fewer than 3 chapters and verify HTTP 422 TOO_FEW_CHAPTERS.
Run pnpm verify.

features.description: Multi-stage pipeline performs chapter analysis, screenplay bible generation, scene generation, validation, and bounded structure repair.
steps: Use a longer sample novel with at least 5 chapters.
Run split -> analyze -> bible -> generate -> validate.
Force a structural validation failure and verify repair retries are bounded.
Verify successful repair turns validation red to green without rewriting story objects.
Run pnpm verify.

features.description: YAML editor allows direct edits, debounce validation, and displays precise validation errors.
steps: Generate or load valid YAML.
Edit YAML in the editor.
Verify validation runs after editing.
Break project.title and verify the validation panel shows a precise path.
Run pnpm verify and pnpm test:ui.

features.description: Screenplay preview renders five beat types: action, dialogue, narration, transition, and inner_voice.
steps: Load YAML containing all five beat types.
Verify scene header shows scene number, title, location, time, and characters.
Verify each beat type renders in a readable screenplay format.
Verify preview is disabled or clearly marked when validation fails.
Run pnpm verify and pnpm test:ui.

features.description: Users can export the current screenplay as YAML and Markdown.
steps: Load or generate valid YAML.
Export .yaml and verify it parses back to the same top-level structure.
Export .md and verify it contains readable scene and beat text.
Run pnpm verify and pnpm test:ui.

features.description: Inputs with fewer than 3 chapters are blocked with a friendly, specific message.
steps: Submit a 2-chapter Chinese novel.
Verify generation is blocked before LLM work starts.
Verify the UI tells the user at least 3 chapters are required and how many were detected.
Run pnpm verify and pnpm test:ui.

features.description: Loading, empty, and error states are clear across generation, validation, and export paths.
steps: Throttle or mock slow API responses.
Verify loading state is visible and buttons cannot double-submit.
Force server error and verify the UI shows a specific error path or phase.
Run pnpm verify and pnpm test:ui.

features.description: Demo assets include a stable valid YAML, a deliberately broken YAML, README, and a 3-minute demo route.
steps: Verify examples/novel-sample.md has at least 3 chapters.
Verify examples/screenplay-sample.yaml is valid.
Add a broken YAML fixture for validation demo.
Update README with setup and demo route.
Run pnpm verify and pnpm test:ui.
